title: Israel says it will take control of large buffer zone in southern Lebanon
summary_full: Thousands of displaced Lebanese residents will not be allowed to return home until northern Israel is safe, Israel's defence minister says.
summary_public: Thousands of displaced Lebanese residents will not be allowed to return home until northern Israel is safe, Israel's defence minister says.

IL.label: negative
IL.evidence: Israel says it will take control of large buffer zone

LB.evidence: Thousands of displaced Lebanese residents will not be allowed to return
